title: English Teacher
description:
· Plan, prepare, and deliver engaging lessons that meet students’ learning needs.

· Develop lesson materials and teaching aids that enhance classroom participation.

· Conduct classroom administration and maintain a conducive learning environment.

· Mark assignments and assessments with constructive feedback.

· Track and report student progress each semester through progress reports.

· Establish and maintain positive relationships with students and parents.

· Provide regular updates to parents on students’ academic performance and development.

· Conduct training sessions for part-time or new teachers when required.

· Represent the company at marketing events, open houses, and community outreach programs.

· Perform other ad-hoc duties assigned by the academic director.

Requirements

· Diploma or Degree in Education or a related field.

· Teachers with CELTA, TESOL, or TEFL certifications will be given priority.

· Prior teaching or tutoring experience is preferred (MOE syllabus experience a plus).

· Passionate about teaching and able to engage students effectively.

· Strong classroom management and communication skills.

· Positive, nurturing, and patient personality with a natural rapport with children.

· Able to work on weekends and follow tuition centre’s operating schedule.

· Energetic, adaptable, and thrives in a collaborative, fast-paced environment.

postedCompany.description:
Blue Ocean Education Center is a dynamic education organization based in Singapore, dedicated to providing high-quality academic enrichment and online tutoring services for primary and secondary students. Our mission is to connect passionate educators with motivated learners through an innovative and technology-driven learning ecosystem.

We specialize in English, Mathematics, Science, and Chinese enrichment programs aligned with the MOE syllabus, as well as international curriculum support for AEIS, PSLE, and IGCSE examinations.

Our teachers are not only subject experts but also mentors who inspire curiosity, critical thinking, and creativity in students. We combine traditional classroom learning with digital resources to make education more engaging, personalized, and effective.

Our Core Values:
• Integrity & Professionalism: We uphold the highest standards in teaching ethics and student care.
• Innovation in Learning: We integrate digital tools, adaptive materials, and interactive methods.
• Commitment to Excellence: Every student’s growth is our priority.
• Collaborative Culture: We value teamwork and continuous teacher development.

Why Join Us:
• Supportive, collaborative, and forward-thinking teaching environment.
• Opportunities for professional training and curriculum innovation.
• Flexible teaching schedules and hybrid lesson models.
• Attractive remuneration packages based on experience and performance.

Positions We’re Hiring:
• English / Mathematics / Science / Chinese Teachers (Primary & Secondary levels)
• Online Tutors (AEIS / PSLE / IGCSE preparation)
• Curriculum Development Associates
• Education Consultants & Student Support Officers
postedCompany.name: YUN FAN FEI YANG PTE. LTD.
